const activities = {

    { id: 7, title: "⚖️ Heavy or Light" },
    { id: 8, title: "⏰ Daily Time Match" },

  grade3: [
    { id: 1, title: "🔢 Build the Number" },
    { id: 2, title: "➕ Addition Machine" },
    { id: 3, title: "➖ Borrowing Game" },

    { id: 7, title: "🧪 Fill the Bottle" },

  grade4: [

    { id: 2, title: "🧠 Math Adventure" },
